docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT MERVIL, JOSUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-17-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP. DEFENDANT JOSUE MERVIL IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY JUVEN DESTINE NON CERTIFIED HAITIAN INTERPRETER. THE NON CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN REPRESENTED BY DANIEL SCALAN VP TOWING. DEFENDANT JOSUE MERVIL DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MERVIL, JOSUE HEARING SET FOR JAN-17-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $140.00) SERVED OCT-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MERVIL, JOSUE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERVIL, JOSUE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00, COSTS REDUCED FOR EXCESSIVE SERVICE FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER MOTION TO VACATE - OFF CALENDAR. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MERVIL, JOSUE
